label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 2

extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won the sprint in Burgos after navigating the barriers on the left while JAKOBSEN went right and MATTHEWS finished third.
tactical_patterns: Astana burned energy for ARANBURU's green jersey defense on intermediate sprint, mistimed effort and got beaten by JAKOBSEN's opportunism.
TRENTIN Matteo led out MILANO for UAE in final 2km with clearest vision; rival sprinters forced left/right split.
Ineos crashed outside 3km zone on zigzag course, losing time—positioning critical on technical finales before sprint stages.

rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: executed barrier-hugging left-side sprint when boxed sprinters hesitated, shows superior technical confidence in chaotic finishes
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: positive: opportunistically took intermediate sprint when Astana mistimed leadout, but lost communication with train in finale
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: strong independent sprint to third without clear leadout suggests excellent positioning instincts
rider_signals.ARANBURU Alex: negative: Astana's intermediate sprint defense effort for his green jersey wasted energy and failed tactically
rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: positive: UAE's clearest vision in technical finale suggests pre-race course recon advantage over rivals
rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: negative: boxed in by poor DSM positioning despite having leadout train present
